message:
feat(tests): add PTY+VT100 visual testing infrastructure

Adds closed-loop automated visual testing using:
- portable-pty to spawn TUI in real pseudo-terminal
- vt100 to parse terminal output into inspectable screen buffer

Tests verify:
- Text renders correctly (no garbled characters)
- Keyboard navigation works
- Tour mode displays properly
- Cache.rs content shows "use std::io::{self, Write};" correctly

Run with: cargo test --features pty-tests --test visual_pty_test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -46,6 +46,9 @@ serde_json = "1"
 tempfile = "3"
 tracing = "0.1.44"
 tracing-subscriber = "0.3.22"
+# PTY testing infrastructure
+portable-pty = "0.8"
+vt100 = "0.15"
 
 [[bench]]
 name = "buffer"
